description: Preview of the native TypeScript language server for Visual Studio Code.
native-preview.trace.customConfigFileNam: Custom config file name to use e.g. 'tsconfig.all.json', before defaulting to tsconfig.json/jsconfig.json.
native-preview.pprofDir.description: Directory to write pprof profiles to.
native-preview.tsserver.tsdk.description: Path to the @typescript/native-preview package or tsgo binary directory. If not specified, the extension will look for it in the default location.
native-preview.additionalTsdkLocations.d: Additional paths to tsgo binary directories or @typescript/native-preview packages that should appear in the version selector.
native-preview.showDebugInfo.description: Show debug information (PID, executable path) in the server menu.
native-preview.goMemLimit.description: Set GOMEMLIMIT for the language server (e.g., '2048MiB', '4GiB'). See https://pkg.go.dev/runtime#hdr-Environment_Variables for more information.
native-preview.goMemLimit.error: Must be a valid memory limit (e.g., '2048MiB', '4GiB').
native-preview.enable.title: Enable (Experimental)
native-preview.disable.title: Disable
native-preview.restart.title: Restart Language Server
native-preview.output.focus.title: Show Output
native-preview.reportIssue.title: Report Issue
native-preview.selectVersion.title: Select TypeScript Version...
native-preview.sortImports.title: Sort Imports
native-preview.removeUnusedImports.title: Remove Unused Imports
native-preview.dev.runGC.title: TypeScript Native Preview: Run Garbage Collection
native-preview.dev.saveHeapProfile.title: TypeScript Native Preview: Save Heap Profile
native-preview.dev.saveAllocProfile.titl: TypeScript Native Preview: Save Allocation Profile
native-preview.dev.startCPUProfile.title: TypeScript Native Preview: Start CPU Profile
native-preview.dev.stopCPUProfile.title: TypeScript Native Preview: Stop CPU Profile
native-preview.initializeAPIConnection.u: TypeScript Native Preview: Initialize API Connection
